name: There Exists Nobody
short_description: You arrive at a deserted street that feels familiar yet is filled with unease. Pick up your camera, capture the hidden anomalies, and break this endless loop.
detailed_description:
"There Exists Nobody" is a spot-the-difference anomaly horror game. You dream of returning to the streets of your childhood, but find yourself trapped in a loop with no way out. Here, you will encounter various surreal anomalies—observe carefully and find them!

Anomaly-Hunting Horror Game

In "There Exists Nobody," your task is to carefully look for anomalies on the street. When you discover one, use the in-game camera to capture it. Sometimes, the street may have no anomalies at all, so make sure to decide carefully.

TIPS: When you are near an anomaly, the camera may malfunction—make good use of this!

Immersive Walking Simulator

"There Exists Nobody" includes some mildly eerie elements, but there are no chases or jump scares. You don’t need to be nervous; you can wear headphones and fully immerse yourself in the experience of this street. While searching for anomalies, use your camera to take some retro photos!

Collectibles

The game features over 20 different anomalies. We’ve also created some analog horror "short films" for the anomalies, which you can watch and collect after discovering them.

Game Duration

The game needs about 20 to 40 minutes to finish, with full collection taking over an hour.
